disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to tolerate any oral fluids for ~12 hours, with reduced urine output over the day
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to keep any fluids down at all?
How much urine have you passed today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I can't keep even water down, it comes straight back up. I've hardly weed at all today, which isn't like me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Heart pounds/races and severe lightheadedness on standing, relieved by lying flat
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you stand up?
Does lying down make the dizziness better?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The second I stand up my heart races and thumps and the room spins — I nearly black out. Lying flat settles it a little.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Vomit is non-bloody and not bile-stained (not green); flatus was passed earlier in the day
trigger_question_examples: What does the vomit look like — is there any blood, or is it green/bile-coloured?
Have you been able to pass wind at all today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's just stomach stuff and froth — no blood, and it's not green. And yes, I was passing wind earlier today.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't really looked closely, I've just been trying to get through it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Abdomen feels swollen, tight and bloated all over rather than painful in one fixed spot; pain comes in cramping waves
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain in one particular spot, or all over?
Is the pain constant, or does it come and go in waves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's all over and my belly feels swollen and tight — it's not one sharp spot. The pain comes in cramping waves.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It just hurts, I can't really describe where.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels full in the bladder but cannot pass urine properly (incomplete emptying)
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to empty your bladder normally?
Does your bladder feel full even after you try to go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: That's another thing — my bladder feels full and uncomfortable but I can't seem to empty it properly.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I've just not been drinking so I haven't needed to go, I think.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known long-standing connective-tissue condition with previous similar gut/dizziness flares, but this episode is more severe than usual
trigger_question_examples: Have you had episodes like this before?
Is this the same as your usual flares or worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I do get flares like this with my connective tissue condition, but I can usually still sip fluids. This one is the worst — I can't keep anything down at all.
